response_body_utf8: {"version":"6.9","hitCount":1,"request":{"queryString":"EXT_ID:42346894 AND SRC:MED","internalQuery":"EXT_ID:42346894 AND SRC:MED","resultType":"CORE","cursorMark":"*","pageSize":5,"sort":"","synonym":false},"resultList":{"result":[{"id":"42346894","source":"MED","pmid":"42346894","pmcid":"PMC13302442","fullTextIdList":{"fullTextId":["PMC13302442"]},"doi":"10.3390/jimaging12060231","title":"When AI and Experts Agree on Error: Intrinsic Ambiguity in Dermatoscopic Images.","authorString":"Cino L, Mazzeo PL, Martella A, Radi G, Rossi R, Distante C.","authorList":{"author":[{"fullName":"Cino L","firstName":"Loris","lastName":"Cino","initials":"L","authorId":{"type":"ORCID","value":"0009-0005-5326-7627"},"authorAffiliationDetailsList":{"authorAffiliation":[{"affiliation":"Dipartimento di Ingegneria Informatica, Automatica e Gestionale (DIAG), Sapienza Università di Roma, Via Ariosto, 25, 00185 Rome, Italy."}]}},{"fullName":"Mazzeo PL","firstName":"Pier Luigi","lastName":"Mazzeo","initials":"PL","authorId":{"type":"ORCID","value":"0000-0002-7552-2394"},"authorAffiliationDetailsList":{"authorAffiliation":[{"affiliation":"Istituto di Scienze Applicate e Sistemi Intelligenti (ISASI), Consiglio Nazionale delle Ricerche (CNR), Via Monteroni s.n, 73100 Lecce, Italy."}]}},{"fullName":"Martella A","firstName":"Alessandro","lastName":"Martella","initials":"A","authorId":{"type":"ORCID","value":"0009-0002-4793-3337"},"authorAffiliationDetailsList":{"authorAffiliation":[{"affiliation":"Dermatologia Myskin, Poliambulatorio Specialistico Medico-Chirurgico, Via S. Marco, 21, 73030 Tiggiano, Italy."}]}},{"fullName":"Radi G","firstName":"Giulia","lastName":"Radi","initials":"G","authorAffiliationDetailsList":{"authorAffiliation":[{"affiliation":"AST Pesaro-Urbino, Via Borsellino 4, 60019 Fano, Italy."}]}},{"fullName":"Rossi R","firstName":"Renato","lastName":"Rossi","initials":"R","authorAffiliationDetailsList":{"authorAffiliation":[{"affiliation":"La Rocca Skin Medical Center, Via Marchetti, 110, 61122 Senigallia, Italy."}]}},{"fullName":"Distante C","firstName":"Cosimo","lastName":"Distante","initials":"C","authorId":{"type":"ORCID","value":"0000-0002-1073-2390"},"authorAffiliationDetailsList":{"authorAffiliation":[{"affiliation":"Istituto di Scienze Applicate e Sistemi Intelligenti (ISASI), Consiglio Nazionale delle Ricerche (CNR), Via Monteroni s.n, 73100 Lecce, Italy."}]}}]},"authorIdList":{"authorId":[{"type":"ORCID","value":"0000-0002-1073-2390"},{"type":"ORCID","value":"0000-0002-7552-2394"},{"type":"ORCID","value":"0009-0002-4793-3337"},{"type":"ORCID","value":"0009-0005-5326-7627"}]},"journalInfo":{"issue":"6","volume":"12","journalIssueId":4220201,"dateOfPublication":"2026 May","monthOfPublication":5,"yearOfPublication":2026,"printPublicationDate":"2026-05-01","journal":{"title":"Journal of imaging","medlineAbbreviation":"J Imaging","issn":"2313-433X","nlmid":"101698819","isoabbreviation":"J Imaging","essn":"2313-433X"}},"pubYear":"2026","pageInfo":"231","abstractText":"The integration of artificial intelligence (AI), particularly convolutional neural networks (CNNs), into dermatological diagnosis demonstrates substantial clinical potential. While the existing literature predominantly benchmarks algorithmic performance against human experts, our study adopts a novel perspective by investigating the intrinsic complexity of dermatoscopic images. Through rigorous experimentation with multiple CNN architectures, we isolated a subset of images systematically misclassified across all models-a phenomenon statistically proven to exceed random chance. To determine whether these failures stem from algorithmic biases or inherent visual ambiguity, expert dermatologists independently evaluated these challenging cases alongside a control group. The results revealed a collapse in human diagnostic performance on the AI-misclassified images. First, agreement with ground-truth labels plummeted, with Cohen's kappa dropping to a mere 0.08 for this subset, compared to 0.61 for the control group. Second, we observed a severe deterioration in expert consensus; inter-rater reliability among physicians fell from moderate concordance (Fleiss' kappa = 0.456) on control images to only modest agreement (Fleiss' kappa = 0.275) on the misclassified subset. We identified image quality as a primary driver of these dual systematic failures. To promote transparency and reproducibility, all data, code, and trained models have been made publicly available.","affiliation":"Dipartimento di Ingegneria Informatica, Automatica e Gestionale (DIAG), Sapienza Università di Roma, Via Ariosto, 25, 00185 Rome, Italy.","publicationStatus":"epublish","language":"eng","pubModel":"Electronic","pubTypeList":{"pubType":["research-article","Journal Article"]},"grantsList":{"grant":[{"grantId":"B53C22003630006","agency":"Ministero dell'università e della ricerca","orderIn":0}]},"keywordList":{"keyword":["Statistical analysis","Dermatology","Image Quality","Medical Image Analysis","Deep Learning","Machine Learning (Ml)","Artificial Intelligence (Ai)","Convolutional Neural Networks (Cnns)"]},"fullTextUrlList":{"fullTextUrl":[{"availability":"Subscription required","availabilityCode":"S","documentStyle":"doi","site":"DOI","url":"https://doi.org/10.3390/jimaging12060231"},{"availability":"Open access","availabilityCode":"OA","documentStyle":"html","site":"Europe_PMC","url":"https://europepmc.org/articles/PMC13302442"},{"availability":"Open access","availabilityCode":"OA","documentStyle":"pdf","site":"Europe_PMC","url":"https://europepmc.org/articles/PMC13302442?pdf=render"}]},"isOpenAccess":"Y","inEPMC":"Y","inPMC":"Y","hasPDF":"Y","hasBook":"N","hasSuppl":"N","citedByCount":0,"hasData":"N","hasReferences":"N","hasTextMinedTerms":"Y","hasDbCrossReferences":"N","hasLabsLinks":"N","license":"cc by","hasEvaluations":"N","authMan":"N","epmcAuthMan":"N","nihAuthMan":"N","hasTMAccessionNumbers":"N","dateOfCompletion":"2026-06-25","dateOfCreation":"2026-06-25","firstIndexDate":"2026-06-26","fullTextReceivedDate":"2026-06-26","dateOfRevision":"2026-06-25","electronicPublicationDate":"2026-05-27","firstPublicationDate":"2026-05-27"}]}}
